story.id: Nangka muda direbus 12 jam dengan santan dan gula aren. Resep dapur abdi dalem yang tak berubah sejak abad ke-18.
story.en: Young jackfruit boiled for 12 hours with coconut milk and palm sugar. A royal kitchen recipe unchanged since the 18th century.

story.id: Kikil dan kulit sapi ditumis dengan cabai rawit dalam jumlah industrial. Provokasi terhadap rasa manis-gurih.
story.en: Beef tendon and skin stir-fried with an industrial amount of bird's eye chili. A provocation against the sweet-savory norm.

story.id: Dua tusuk jeruji sepeda memastikan daging kambing matang merata. Hanya dibumbui garam kasar.
story.en: Two bicycle spokes skewers ensure the mutton is cooked evenly. Seasoned only with coarse sea salt.

story.id: Akulturasi kuliner Tionghoa-Jawa abad 20. Kulit tipis berlapis isi pasta kacang hijau kukus tradisional.
story.en: 20th-century Chinese-Javanese culinary acculturation. Thin layered skin filled with traditional steamed mung bean paste.

story.id: Arang membara yang diceburkan memunculkan karbon aktif yang menetralkan asam lambung.
story.en: Plunging burning charcoal releases activated carbon that neutralizes stomach acid.

story.id: Campuran jahe bakar, kayu secang, cengkeh, dan pala yang tampak seperti reruntuhan dedaunan.
story.en: A blend of roasted ginger, sappan wood, cloves, and nutmeg that looks like leaf debris.
